emotional_tone: Cinematic, premium, tactile, authoritative, futuristic but grounded. Feels like physical glass in a dark room with a warm ambient light.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl font-display font-semibold tracking-tighter leading-[0.9]
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-display font-medium tracking-tight leading-none
hierarchy.body_lg: text-lg md:text-xl font-sans font-light text-zinc-400 leading-relaxed
hierarchy.overline: text-xs font-sans font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-emerald-500

global.smooth_scroll: Lenis must be implemented at the root level for butter-smooth momentum scrolling.
global.page_transition: Initial black screen loader that slides up after a split-text reveal of 'NEXORA'.
global.custom_cursor: Dot + Ring custom cursor following the mouse, built with Framer Motion. Blends with background using mix-blend-mode: difference.

micro_interactions.magnetic_buttons: Primary CTAs must use Framer Motion useMotionValue and useSpring to create a magnetic pull effect when hovered.
micro_interactions.hover_states: Glassy cards must feature a soft, diagonal light sweep (specular highlight) on hover, tracked by mouse position. Do NOT use default scale transforms.
micro_interactions.reveal: All sections must fade in and slide up slightly (GSAP ScrollTrigger or Framer Motion whileInView).

surface_styles.glassmorphism_card: bg-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/[0.08] shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] rounded-2xl relative overflow-hidden
surface_styles.grain_overlay: A fixed full-screen div with pointer-events-none and an SVG noise background, opacity 0.4, mix-blend-mode overlay to give a tactile, physical film grain feel.

sections.name: Intro & Hero
sections.design_rules: Full height (100vh). Features a subtle animated mesh gradient background (emerald/amber blurred heavily in the deep background). Headline uses split-text animation (each character animates up). Huge typography. 'Idea to Impact' subheadline. Magnetic primary CTA button.

sections.name: Marquee Strip
sections.design_rules: Infinite horizontal scroll strip built with react-fast-marquee. Text: 'BUILT FOR FOUNDERS • MENTORS • INVESTORS • SCALABLE AI'. Font: Clash Display, large, transparent with 1px white stroke (text-stroke).

sections.name: Idea to Impact Journey (Horizontal Scroll)
sections.design_rules: CRITICAL: This section pins on scroll. The user scrolls down, but the content moves horizontally from left to right. Steps: Idea -> Validation -> MVP -> Launch -> Growth -> Funding. Use GSAP ScrollTrigger + pin: true.

sections.name: Feature Showcase (Bento/Alternating)
sections.design_rules: Bento box or alternating left/right layout. Features: Idea Validation, Business Plan AI, Team Builder, Mentorship, Investor Matching, Market Insights. High-end glassmorphic cards with glossy hover effects.

sections.name: Editorial 'How it Works'
sections.design_rules: David-Whyte style. Massive whitespace. Sticky left column with large text 'The Architecture of Impact'. Right column scrolls through beautiful editorial images and brief paragraphs.

sections.name: Startup Showcase
sections.design_rules: Draggable/momentum-based carousel (Framer Motion drag='x'). Shows dashboard snippets and founder photos.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.design_rules: A sleek card stack effect or horizontal drag. Editorial portraits, elegant typography for quotes.

sections.name: Pricing
sections.design_rules: Monthly/Yearly toggle. When toggled, the numbers must roll/morph (Framer Motion AnimatePresence). Glass cards, one 'Pro' card highlighted with an emerald-to-gold border glow.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.design_rules: Clean, minimal accordion. 1px bottom border for items. Smooth height animation on open.

sections.name: Final CTA
sections.design_rules: Full bleed section. Dark background heavily illuminated by a radial emerald/gold glow. Massive 'Start Your Journey' text. Magnetic CTA.

sections.name: Footer
sections.design_rules: Subtle parallax reveal (footer sits underneath the last section, revealed as user scrolls to bottom). Massive 'NEXORA' logo text, minimal links.

hero_textures.description: Abstract dark glass texture for hero background overlay
Wet glass texture for subtle noise/tactile feel

dashboard_snippets.description: Premium minimal dashboard UI for Feature Showcase
Dark mode interface snippet for Startup Showcase

technical_instructions_to_main_agent: 1. FRAMEWORK: Use React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, GSAP, and @studio-freight/react-lenis (or lenis). Do NOT use TypeScript. Files must be .jsx or .js.
2. TAILWIND CONFIG: Extend colors with the deep charcoal base (#0A0A0C). Add font families 'display': ['Clash Display', 'sans-serif'] and 'sans': ['Satoshi', 'sans-serif'].
3. FONTS: Import Clash Display and Satoshi from Fontshare via standard <link> tags in index.html.
4. GSAP PINNING: Use GSAP ScrollTrigger for the horizontal 'Idea to Impact' journey. Pin the container, animate xPercent based on scroll.
5. MAGNETIC BUTTONS: Implement custom magnetic buttons using framer-motion useMotionValue, useTransform, useSpring mapped to mouse coordinates.
6. CUSTOM CURSOR: Add a global fixed dot and ring cursor that tracks mouse position and uses mix-blend-mode: difference. Hide the default cursor in css.
7. GLOBAL GRAIN: Add a fixed full-screen pseudo-element or div with an SVG noise pattern, pointer-events-none, opacity ~0.04 to add a physical texture across the whole site.
8. ACCESSIBILITY: Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, links, and major sections.
9. AVOID: Do not use default HTML alerts. Do not use Inter or Space Grotesk. Do not use pure black (#000).
10. COMPONENT STRUCTURE: Modularize sections (Hero, Journey, Features, Pricing, etc.) into separate .jsx files to keep code clean.
